de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class JavaASTCollector

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTCollector

  • public class JavaASTCollector
extends JavaASTWalker
    Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order. You can set the type of nodes you want to collect and then start the walker. The found nodes of the given type are returned as a IList

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<ProgramElement> resultList
      the list of found elements
      private Class<?> type
      the type of nodes to be collected

      create the JavaASTWalker

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void doAction(ProgramElement node)
      the action that is performed just before leaving the node the last time
      ImmutableList<ProgramElement> getNodes()
      returns the found nodes of the specified type

        public JavaASTCollector(ProgramElement root,

        type - the Class representing the type of nodes that have to be collected
